game_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

special_mechanics.name: Character Speed Variance
special_mechanics.description: Different playable characters have varying movement speeds; faster-moving characters have less-powerful weapons as a trade-off

special_mechanics.name: Vehicular Combat
special_mechanics.description: Overhead vehicular sections with different vehicles (Dragonfly helicopter, Skystriker jet, M.O.B.A.T. tank, V.A.M.P. jeep) with distinct handling characteristics

special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: One-on-one fighting mode with twelve G.I. Joe characters against eight Cobra operatives; character-specific combat mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay descriptions but no quantitative physics parameters. Movement mechanics vary by character class but specific values are not documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (video game)
